run_backfill_for_subaccount.description: Run live backfill for a sub-account — fetches missing commenter names from Facebook Graph API

seed_demo_subaccount.description: Clone a source sub-account as a non-protected demo copy

run_finetune_training.description: Extract training pairs, PII-redact, moderate content, upload to OpenAI and start fine-tuning job

emergency_health_check.description: Run a full system health check: DB connectivity, table row counts, env var presence for all services (OpenAI, Twilio, VAPI, Stripe, Meta, Gemini), and stuck/failed job counts across all queues. Output written to logs/emergency-health-check.json.

emergency_worker_status.description: Check status of all background workers (agent worker, content publisher, crash report worker, SMS retry processor) based on recent job activity. Output written to logs/emergency-worker-status.json.

emergency_recent_activity.description: Show recent activity across all pipeline surfaces: messages, DMs, webhook events, agent jobs, content publishing jobs, and crash reports. Output written to logs/emergency-recent-activity.json.

emergency_reset_stuck_agent_jobs.description: Reset stuck agent_worker_jobs that have been in 'running' state for more than 10 minutes back to 'pending'. Requires owner unlock.

emergency_reset_stuck_publish_jobs.description: Reset stuck content_publishing_jobs back to 'queued' and clear stale locks. Requires owner unlock.

emergency_reset_stuck_crash_reports.description: Unlock stuck crash_reports that have been locked for more than 15 minutes, allowing the crash report worker to reprocess them. Requires owner unlock.

emergency_database_snapshot.description: Create a database snapshot manifest (table row counts saved to /backups/ directory for audit purposes). Requires owner unlock.
